operationOverride.reason: Login and signup create the first authenticated session; no prior session exists to revoke-check.
Compatibility login delegates to the canonical first-session authentication authority.
Compatibility registration delegates to the canonical first-session authentication authority.
The compatibility endpoint delegates the complete request to the canonical AI Mentor handler and inherits its response policy.
Discoverable-passkey challenge generation intentionally precedes user authentication and sets no session cookie.
Passkey assertion verification establishes the first session after server-side ceremony and credential validation.
Initial control-plane bootstrap is authorized by the one-time bootstrap credential before any admin session exists.
Initial control-plane bootstrap verifies the one-time bootstrap credential and creates the first admin session.
The handler loads the live database-backed admin principal before attempting server-side session revocation.
Admin passkey challenge generation intentionally precedes authentication and creates no active admin authority.
Admin passkey assertion verification establishes a new database-backed admin session after credential validation.
